TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Cirarokohay ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Cinkong Song, kwara sali buwan nya ga 213 buwan, 575 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 71% kyan ku 408 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 29% kyan ku 167 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 68%, Rukay 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cirarokohay hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Cirarokohay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Cirarokohay hya' ga Hikasiki go. tay mkraya' na Cirarokohay hya' ga Nakahama go. tay mkraya' na Cirarokohay hya' ga Pisirian. tay mkyahu' na Cirarokohay hya' ga Kalahaay. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan khu skwan biru maki 1 khu skwan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨirarokoħaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ʦ~ʨinkoŋ s~ɕoŋ, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, rukaj *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨirarokoħaj ħjaʔ ɣa ws~ɕiluŋ kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨirarokoħaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨirarokoħaj ħjaʔ ɣa ħikas~ɕiki ɣo. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨirarokoħaj ħjaʔ ɣa nakaħama ɣo. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨirarokoħaj ħjaʔ ɣa pis~ɕirian. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨirarokoħaj ħjaʔ ɣa kalaħaaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan kħu s~ɕkwan βiru maki * kħu s~ɕkwan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Cirarokohay ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Cinkong Song, kwara sali buwan nya ga 213 buwan, 575 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 71% kyan ku 408 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 29% kyan ku 167 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 68%, Rukay 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cirarokohay hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Cirarokohay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Cirarokohay hya' ga Hikasiki go. tay mkraya' na Cirarokohay hya' ga Nakahama go. tay mkraya' na Cirarokohay hya' ga Pisirian. tay mkyahu' na Cirarokohay hya' ga Kalahaay. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan khu skwan biru maki 1 khu skwan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨirarokoħaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ʦ~ʨinkoŋ s~ɕoŋ, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, rukaj *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨirarokoħaj ħjaʔ ɣa ws~ɕiluŋ kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨirarokoħaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨirarokoħaj ħjaʔ ɣa ħikas~ɕiki ɣo. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨirarokoħaj ħjaʔ ɣa nakaħama ɣo. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨirarokoħaj ħjaʔ ɣa pis~ɕirian. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨirarokoħaj ħjaʔ ɣa kalaħaaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan kħu s~ɕkwan βiru maki * kħu s~ɕkwan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
